rows.label: qev013902_MSG0001
rows.name:
I was the one spreading the word to all
the aliens! As long as no one goes out
of curiosity, it should be fine![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013902_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm convinced she's someone who will
become a bridge with the aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013902_MSG0004
rows.name:
Everyone being equal is a
very good thing, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013902_MSG0005
rows.name:
Because there will be no more
conflict, and no one will get
hurt or die in battles.[ST:wait ]
